title: Construction, Invariants, Dataclasses, and Slots · Transfer Build
summary: Build trustworthy catalog, member, and loan objects from validated external records. The scenario, data, constraints, and failure modes differ from the workshop. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of validated library entity types with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Distinguish object allocation in __new__ from initialization in __init__ and override either only for justified behavior.
Establish complete valid object invariants during construction or reject invalid input with meaningful errors.
Implement classmethod alternate constructors that normalize external representations through one invariant path.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
